description: Product description Relaxing Gel Eye Mask Cool Tension Relief This therapeutic mask can be cooled to relieve the pain of headaches, eye strain and tension. Great for refreshing your eyes during humid summer nights. Features One size fits most. Light and comfortable to wear Gel masks can be cooled in fridge. Elastic strap secures mask in place Relieve tension from headaches, eye strain. Reduce puffiness from eyes and feel more relaxed Dimensions: 0.049kg 15.0cm x 5.5cm x 1.0cm Contains 1 x Relaxing Gel Eye Mask Indications Headaches, migraines, eye strain, sinus pressure Directions To use the mask for cooling, place it in the refrigerator for 30 minutes or directly apply it to the desired area. To use the mask for heating, immerse it in warm water, no hotter than 60 degrees Celsius, until the desired temperature is reached. See more
